• Bug Tracker
  • ID 2298245

Bug ID 2298245: Access Profile Rejects HTTP Requests with Unencoded characters in URI

Last Modified: Jun 04, 2026

Affected Product(s):
BIG-IP APM, Install/Upgrade(all modules)

Known Affected Versions:
17.1.3.2, 17.5.1.6, 21.0.0, 21.0.0.1

Opened: May 22, 2026

Severity: 3-Major

Symptoms

After upgrading to BIG-IP 17.5.1.6, all users fail with certain requests when an Access Profile is applied to the virtual server. Specifically, SharePoint edits or updates fail, and any request containing curly braces ({ or }) results in the error: "Access encountered an error (Operation not supported)." The issue does not occur when the Access Profile is removed or with standard bracket characters (e.g., ( or )).

Impact

Significant impact, especially for environments using Microsoft SharePoint/IIS and browsers like Chrome/Edge that send non-encoded curly braces

Conditions

Requests contain curly braces ({ or } or |) in the URI

Workaround

URI encoding of curly braces ({ - %7B, } - %7D) is accepted with iRule.

Fix Information

None

Behavior Change

Guides & references

K10134038: F5 Bug Tracker Filter Names and Tips
